modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty creating an Outlook distribution group for class emails.

full_description_text: 
The instructor is looking for a simpler way to email all students in a class. Previously, they had to manually search for each student and create a group in Outlook. This process is time-consuming and they want to know if there's an easier method.
short_description: Difficulty creating an Outlook distribution group for class emails.
description: The instructor is looking for a simpler way to email all students in a class. Previously, they had to manually search for each student and create a group in Outlook. This process is time-consuming and they want to know if there's an easier method.
